pr.title: Non-Record: McGilchrist Register Token — causal cumulative mean + FiLM global context pathway

output.summary: Each block adds a right-hemisphere global pathway: a causal cumulative mean feeds a zero-initialized FiLM bottleneck that modulates outputs with holistic context.
techniques: causal cumulative mean summarizes prefix for global context
FiLM projection learns per-block scale/shift from the running mean
zero-init register scale keeps training identical to baseline at start
